findings.evidence: Roadmap lines 100-106 request the lifting criterion and simply-connected special case; `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroup.lean:59` already exposes `FundamentalGroup.map_range_le_of_simplyConnectedSpace`; the new file only has `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_subsingleton_source_subgroup` at lines 66-75.
findings.fix: Add a theorem with `[SimplyConnectedSpace A] [LocallyPathConnectedSpace A]`, e.g. `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_simplyConnectedSpace_source_subgroup`, deriving the range inclusion from `FundamentalGroup.map_range_le_of_simplyConnectedSpace` or the subsingleton wrapper.
findings.issue: The file adds `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_subsingleton_source_subgroup` but no public `SimplyConnectedSpace` subgroup wrapper, even though the target asks to note the simply-connected special case.

summary: The public lifting API is missing the roadmap’s simply-connected-source subgroup specialization; the only added specialization exposes the lower-level fundamental-group subsingleton hypothesis.
